    1. create(String, String, String, String, String, String, List)

Interface AbstractUsbDevice.UsbDeviceFactory

Enclosing class:
AbstractUsbDevice
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface AbstractUsbDevice.UsbDeviceFactory
Constructs a platform-specific UsbDevice from resolved fields; supplied to AbstractUsbDevice.buildDeviceTree(String, String, String, Map, Map, Map, Map, Map, Map, AbstractUsbDevice.UsbDeviceFactory) so the shared tree assembly can create the correct per-platform type.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UsbDevice
    create(String name, String vendor, String vendorId, String productId, String serialNumber, String uniqueDeviceId, List<UsbDevice> connectedDevices)
    Creates a UsbDevice.

  • Method Details

    • create

      UsbDevice create(String name, String vendor, String vendorId, String productId, String serialNumber, String uniqueDeviceId, List<UsbDevice> connectedDevices)
      Creates a UsbDevice.
      Parameters:
      name - the device name
      vendor - the vendor name
      vendorId - the vendor ID
      productId - the product ID
      serialNumber - the serial number
      uniqueDeviceId - the unique device ID
      connectedDevices - the connected child devices
      Returns:
      the created device
